treatment_information.specific_treatment: CTX, azithromycin, aspirin, lasix, heparin gtt, vancomycin, piperacillin-tazobactam, solumedrol
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Aspirin 325mg; Fever managed with symptomatic care; Lasix 20mg; Solumedrol 125mg IV x 1; Heparin gtt continuous infusion; Vancomycin/Zosyn x 1
treatment_information.treatment_response: Developed fever, cough, and chest discomfort; BP noted to drop; Triggered for respiratory rate 35
Gram stain showed no microorganisms; Positive for Influenza A viral antigen

treatment_timeline.event: Patient received Velcade infusion for multiple myeloma.
Patient developed chest pain during blood transfusion.
Empirically treated with CTX and azithromycin.
Admitted to MICU for management of tachypnea.
Subjected to bronchoscopy and bronchoalveolar lavage.
CT scan indicated diffuse aspiration pneumonia.

patient_outcome.complications: Septic shock, hypoxic respiratory failure, anuric acute renal failure
